svg.font-family: -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: Wanderbot agentic architecture
svg.desc: Layered architecture: React client, FastAPI SSE API with security rails, three agent brains, the supervisor state-machine pipeline of 14 specialist nodes with human-in-the-loop gates, shared capabilities, external services, and persistence.
svg.text: Holiday-planning system · LangGraph supervisor over specialist nodes · FastAPI SSE · Python
streams Server-Sent Events · renders itinerary, flight picker, approval & chat
Guardrail backend is config-selectable: AWS Bedrock Guardrails or local regex/heuristics.
supervisor.decide_next() picks ONE specialist per hop; each returns to the router
respond → END when info is insufficient · embedded LLM sub-agents inside nodes: image validator · transport researcher+reviewer · budget-tier estimator

g.text: LangGraph state · pauses & resumes across replicas
saved plans · users · chat threads · day-detail cache

svg.text: Generated from src/wanderbot — graph.py · routing.py · nodes.py · api/*
